summary: Architecture defined for AI Event Cover Image Generation. Backend: new POST /events/generate-cover in api-gateway (ClaudeService + UnsplashService). Flutter: EventFormState @freezed refactor (ADR-7), new CoverGenerationDto/EventCoverService/EventCoverRepositoryImpl/GetGenerateCoverUseCase, CoverPreviewWidget, 5 ARB keys. ADR-8 keeps generateCover() in EventFormCubit. ADR-9 confirms no new Flutter packages needed.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: All 9 required artifacts written: architect.md, 4 slim handoffs, DIAGRAMS.md, state.json, contract JSON, architect-skill.md

qualityGates.name: architecture_contracts_defined

Retrofit endpoint defined. Error mapping strategy defined. 5 l10n keys defined. UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY env var documented.

qualityGates.name: api_contract_complete

qualityGates.name: layer_boundaries_respected
